_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of cloud data platform services across major providers, including storage, compute, streaming, and orchestration capabilities and their architectural implications.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-015 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-021 (AI, cosine: 0.646), TF-K-005 (TF, cosine: 0.589).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.635). Shared vocabulary: [cloud, knowledge, providers]. DCWF-only terms [hosting] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, architectural, capabilities, compute, data, implications] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.911 (P=0.948, R=0.876). P exceeds R by 0.072 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Knowledge of cloud hosting providers." and "Knowledge of cloud data platform services across major providers, including stor" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.666 ≈ STS 0.635 (gap 0.031). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [cloud, knowledge, providers] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 20.0%. Shared tokens: [cloud, knowledge, providers]. DCWF-only: [hosting]. WIDAI-only: [across, architectural, capabilities, compute, data, implications].
